title: Teleconference communications by certain persons
doc_html:
§573.2. Teleconference communications by certain persons

            Notwithstanding any law to the contrary, persons providing testimony may appear before the Board of Pardons by means of teleconference or telephone communication.

            Acts 1997, No. 870, §1; Acts 2020, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 6, §1, eff. Oct. 20, 2020.
doc_text:
§573.2.  Teleconference communications by certain persons
Notwithstanding any law to the contrary, persons providing testimony may appear
before the Board of Pardons by means of teleconference or telephone communication.
Acts 1997, No. 870, §1; Acts 2020, 2
nd
Ex. Sess., No. 6, §1, eff. Oct. 20, 2020.
